LAW AND MOTION 302, NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT DURABLA MANUFACTURING COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES CLAIM IN PLAINTIFFS' COMPLAINT IS DENIED. THE ALLEGATIONS ARE SUFFICIENT UNDER PERKINS V. SUPERIOR COURT (1982) 31 CAL. 3D 147, 158; CIVIL CODE SECTION 3294. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

Notice Of Motion To Strike Punitive Damages Claim In Plaintiffs' Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-23-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jessica Biernier of Levin Simes Kaiser & Gornick (273.8135) for plaintiff and responding party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT DURABLA MANUFACTURING COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES CLAIM IN PLAINTIFFS' COMPLAINT is denied. The allegations are sufficient under Perkins v. Superior Court (1982) 31 Cal. 3d 147, 158; Civil Code Section 3294. Order signed in open Court. (302/PJM/JW) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
